# BrewSage

> AI-powered coffee coaching app for iOS and Android. Stop wasting beans. Dial in faster. Discover coffee you'll love.

## About

BrewSage is the coffee app that actually helps you get better. Most coffee apps track what you brew — BrewSage tells you what to change next. Built for the much larger market of enthusiastic home brewers who want guidance, not just a logbook.

Currently in popular beta with a growing community of home coffee enthusiasts testing across iOS and Android.

## How It Works

Two AI personalities power the experience:

- **Brew Coach** — Your technique advisor. Analyzes your brew history and suggests specific setting adjustments for your exact machine. Gets smarter with every brew you log.
- **The Brew Sage** — Your coffee sommelier. Builds a taste identity from your brewing data and recommends beans you'll actually love, including a "stretch pick" to push your palate.

## What Makes BrewSage Different

- **Machine-specific coaching** — Not generic advice. BrewSage knows the difference between a KitchenAid KF7, a Moccamaster KBGV Select, and an AeroPress, and coaches accordingly.
- **AI that learns your patterns** — Setting-outcome correlations, cross-bean analysis, dialed-in detection, and taste evolution tracking — all computed from your real brew data.
- **Meets you where you are** — Supports super-automatics, semi-autos, pour-over, batch brewers, and more. You don't need a refractometer or a $3,000 setup.
- **Local-first** — Your data lives on your device. Works offline. No account required.

## Supported Equipment

15+ machine types with dedicated brew forms: KitchenAid KF6/KF7/KF8, Moccamaster (KBGV Select, KBG, Cup-One), Nespresso Momento 100, xBloom Studio, Hario V60, Chemex, AeroPress, Kalita Wave, French Press, Clever Dripper, Fellow Stagg, Moka Pot, Semi-Auto Espresso, and more. 36 grinder presets across 14 brands.

## Key Features

- Post-brew AI coaching that learns your patterns
- Pre-brew guidance for new beans (First Brew Guide)
- Bean label scanning via photo
- Personalized taste identity and bean recommendations
- Roaster bean lookup with auto-fill for partner roasters
- Taste evolution tracking over time
- Beautiful warm "Roastery" design theme (light and dark modes)
